Personally, I think this game is very fun. The horror mode is good and the UFO’s in the shop are really fun to play around with. There is only 5 game modes tho but I totally understand what you say. But the game just got revamped, you can’t blame the creators. This game is worth trying out.
Stinky

This game really did stand out, out of all the games I’ve played. This game is in great quality ever since it came out, movement, player model and maps really outstood, the gamemodes are amazing such as backgrounds or parkour, would recommend this game to any new players looking for a new game to play.

reviews.review_title: Polar chase it one of the best games
reviews.review_description:
Polar chase is a game with gorilla tag movement 
It has many choices when u join example only up 
Colour blocks and even a shop this is truly an amazing experience to play with friends and 
A random lobby !

This game is one of the best fangames I’ve played! It has tons of maps/game modes to play solo or with your friends, and honestly the community isn’t bad and the mods are cool. The mods even do events like squid game! Which I find really cool I haven’t seen any other fan game like this one

I think 15$ for 15 mods is a good deal. The maps are really high quality, so are the player models. The cosmetics are cool and makes you want to grind for cool cosmetics. The horror mode is my favorite. Good community and very active staff.
When I joined this game I found several mods and they were very very helpful which allowed me to have a good time and I overall just liked the experience with the gameplay love y’all’s game!

This game is really nice all the mod menud and updates ther absolutely good the modes are good like only up backrooms or horror I've beat only up and it's really fun u get daily fish and u get alot cosmetics are cheap.
i love everything about this game the horror and the backrooms i got a good scare for this game i recommend this game for other people!

I highly recommend playing this game. It’s a lot of fun. It has mods in it. It has a bunch of game mode so you can have fun with your friends or play by yourself. 
￼

reviews.review_title: The creator is fire for making this 🔥
reviews.review_description: I honestly love this game and I love playing this game with my friends. One of my favorite parts of this game is probably the only up area because I like parkour. I definitely recommend this game for others who like gorilla tag type movement games.
I like the game, but people are abusing the mods that they can buy and it’s very annoying, but I can barely play the game at all
This game is just nice to play the sky blue,white having a new character to play and multiple different cosmetics and also no violence!!
Polar Chase is an all original gtag fan game. There's so much diversity and fun things to do. Overall, you should try this game.
I remember playing this game back in 2022-2023 and it was such a blast and this remake is stunning 🤩

This game is good and safe for kids that have motion sickness they don't have high drops in the game there's just one bad thing about the game theres just the graphics are to powerful for the quest 1 and 2  it's very laggy and not really at the same time so this is totally recommended for gtag kids and there isn't that much toxicity and don't forget to check out the discord

reviews.review_description: I've love the game since beta testing. I love that they're gonna add so many more gamemodes to choose and have so much to do. Still disappointed that they took away to og fish away and made it very small and color changeing. Rip mr fish my beloved
